featured.title: FBI confirms hack of Director Patel's personal email inbox
featured.summary: The Handala hackers associated with Iran have breached the personal email account of FBI Director Kash Patel and published photos and documents. [...]
featured.suggestedTitle: FBI Director's Email Breached by Iranian-Linked Hackers
featured.suggestedSummary: The personal email account of FBI Director Patel has been breached by the Handala hackers, a group associated with Iran. This compromise highlights the ongoing threat posed by nation-state actors targeting high-profile individuals. Security teams should review email security protocols and consider additional protective measures for executives and high-value targets.

featured.title: Data breach at US insurance firm may have exposed personal data of 7,400 people - Cybernews
featured.summary: Data breach at US insurance firm may have exposed personal data of 7,400 people  Cybernews
featured.suggestedTitle: US Insurance Firm Data Breach Exposes Personal Information
featured.suggestedSummary: A data breach at a US insurance firm has potentially exposed the personal data of 7,400 individuals. The breach involved sensitive information such as Social Security numbers, increasing the risk of identity theft. Security teams should ensure robust data protection measures are in place and monitor for any signs of compromised information being used maliciously.

quickNews.title: File read flaw in Smart Slider plugin impacts 500K WordPress sites
quickNews.summary: A vulnerability in the Smart Slider 3 WordPress plugin, active on more than 800,000 websites, can be exploited to allow subscriber-level users access to arbitrary files on the server. [...]
